booking.title: Booking
booking.description: An appointment booked by a client for waxing/manscaping services.

id.description: The unique ID of the booking.

clientName.description: The full name of the client.

clientEmail.description: The email address of the client.

clientPhone.description: The phone number of the client.

services.description: The list of services added to the cart.

totalDuration.description: Total duration in minutes including 15 min cleaning buffer.

time.description: Booking time slot formatted as HH:MM.

status.description: The current status of the booking.

ndaSigned.description: Whether the client signed the NDA.

ndaSignature.description: The digital signature representation (e.g. text or canvas data URL).

isOver18.description: Whether the client is 18 years or older.

skincareCheck.description: Confirmation that facial skincare products (Retin-A, Accutane) were not used recently if facial waxing is selected.

stripeCardHoldToken.description: Token representing the Stripe card hold reference.

googleEventId.description: The corresponding Google Calendar event ID.

createdAt.description: The timestamp of when the booking was made.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the booking was updated.

blockout.title: Blockout
blockout.description: A blocked-out date or vacation period designated by Drew.

calendar_busy_slot.title: CalendarBusySlot
calendar_busy_slot.description: A busy slot synchronized from Drew's Google Calendar to prevent scheduling conflicts.

googleEventId.description: The ID of the primary Google Calendar event.

date.description: The date of the busy slot as YYYY-MM-DD.

syncedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when this slot was synchronized.

client_profile.title: ClientProfile
client_profile.description: A detailed profile for a registered client containing contact details and studio preferences.

clientName.description: The full name of the client.

clientEmail.description: The lowercase client email address (acts as unique record ID).

skinSensitivity.description: Self-reported skin sensitivities (e.g. standard, hyper-reactive, retinol-user).

preferredMusic.description: Preferred ambient room music or atmosphere.

notes.description: Additional custom preferences, service notes, or waxing specific guidelines.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last profile update.

profile_request.title: ProfileRequest
profile_request.description: A client request to edit or delete their studio profile, reviewed by Drew.

clientEmail.description: Email of the client initiating the request.

clientName.description: Name of the client initiating the request.

requestType.description: The type of change requested (edit or delete).

details.description: Detailed description of requested edits or deletion rationale.

status.description: The processing status of the request.

/bookings/{bookingId}.description: Collection of visitor bookings and manscaping/waxing appointments.

/blockouts/{blockoutId}.description: Collection of blocked calendar days and vacation rest periods.

/drew_calendar_busy_slots/{slotId}.description: Collection of Drew's Google Calendar busy event intervals.

/client_profiles/{profileId}.description: Secure storage directory for client-specific profile details.

/profile_requests/{requestId}.description: Secure collection for pending profile alteration or erasure requests from clients.
